"[1] -------------Original Message---------------- From: 83-Santa Fe Springs (83) Sent: 2/27/2026 21:23:35 To: 83-Santa Fe Springs; 83-CZP1 Subject: FW: CZP 1 CLOSURE INFO
-------------Original Message---------------- From: 83-CZP1 Sent: 2/27/2026 21:22:00 To: +83 Controlling Dispatcher Subject: CZP 1 CLOSURE INFO
I-605 SB FROM BEVERLY TO WHITTIER #3 AND #4 LANES / AND SB 605 TO BEVERLY OFF AND WHITTIER OFF CLOSED. WE WILL BE WORKING UNTIL APPROX 0600 HOURS BUT THIS IS FOR A 55 HR CLOSURE"
